programme.desc: Following her breakout success as the star of a killer clown horror flick, Bowie now finds herself struggling to capitalize on its success. But when she is held hostage by an unhinged fan posing as that same killer clown, horror becomes her reality.

programme.title: Bubba Ho-Tep
programme.desc: Switching with an impersonator before his "death" and missing his chance to switch back, Elvis ends up at a nursing home in Texas. With a resident who thinks he's JFK, Elvis must battle evil who has chosen their care facility as his hunting grounds.

programme.title: Maximum Overdrive
programme.desc: After a mysterious comet turns every machine on Earth into a homicidal rampage device, the survivors at the Dixie Boy Truck Stop are making a stand, and human vengeance goes into overdrive.

programme.title: Stephen King's Silver Bullet
programme.desc: Something is killing off townsfolk in Tarker's Mills. Something ingenious. Something remotely human. But the only person in town with courage to stop this lurking menace is a 13-year-old boy, confined to a wheelchair since birth.

programme.title: Stephen King's Graveyard Shift
programme.desc: When a mill is reopened, several employees meet their deaths. The killings all occur between 11 p.m. and 7 a.m. the Graveyard Shift. Soon, the workers find a maze of tunnels leading to the cemetery and the horror that comes alive at night.

programme.title: Stephen King's Thinner
programme.desc: An obese attorney accidentally runs down and kills an old gypsy woman. After her ancient father puts a curse on him, he starts losing weight, and cannot stop. Based on the Stephen King novel, written under the pseudonym Richard Bachman.

programme.title: The Dark Half
programme.desc: A writer undergoes an operation that reveals a twin in his brain. He begins a double writing life, using a pseudonym for his disreputable best-sellers. When the pseudonym discovers he is to be eradicated, he goes on a murderous rampage.

programme.title: The Virgin Suicides
programme.desc: In the mid-1970s, in a Michigan community, live the Lisbon sisters, five teenagers who have bewitched a group of neighborhood boys.

programme.title: Junebug
programme.desc: Rising stars Amy Adams and Ben McKenzie light up the screen in this award-winning comedy about love, family, ambition, and the choices that come with each. When worldly art dealer Madeleine (Embeth Davidtz) meets her new Southern in-laws. Rated: R

programme.title: The Terminal
programme.desc: After arriving at New York's JFK airport, Viktor Navorski gets unwittingly caught in bureaucratic glitches that make it impossible for him to return to his home country or enter the U.S.

programme.title: Up in the Air
programme.desc: Ryan (George Clooney) flies all over for work, but after meeting a passenger he learns that life isn't about the journey, but the connections we make along the way.

programme.title: Air
programme.desc: From award-winning director Ben Affleck, Air reveals the game-changing partnership between a then undiscovered Michael Jordan and Nike’s fledgling basketball division which revolutionized the world of sports and culture with the Air Jordan brand.

programme.title: Hoosiers
programme.desc: A man gets a last-chance job coaching a small-town Indiana high-school basketball team and faces the dual challenge of bringing this underdog team to the 1951 state championship and redeeming himself from a mysterious past.

programme.title: Congo
programme.desc: When an explorer’s quest for a diamond mine ends tragically in the Congo, his father and the operation’s CEO sends Dr. Karen Ross, into the jungle to continue the hunt…maybe for his son, but definitely for the diamonds.

programme.title: Love and Monsters
programme.desc: In a monster-infested world, Joel (Dylan O'Brien) learns his high school sweetheart (Jessica Henwick) is just 80 miles away. Now, Joel must discover his inner hero, facing unknown dangers on the impossible journey to be with the girl of his dreams.

programme.title: Push
programme.desc: Superhumans defy a government plot to harness and abuse their powers. Chris Evans and Dakota Fanning (the TWILIGHT films) team in a pulse-pounding paranormal thriller.

programme.title: Labyrinth
programme.desc: Sixteen-year-old Sarah must solve a labyrinth to rescue her baby brother when he is taken by the Goblin King.

programme.title: The Dark Crystal
programme.desc: On another planet in the distant past, a Gelfling embarks on a quest to find the missing shard of a magical crystal, and to restore order to his world.

programme.title: Masters of the Universe
programme.desc: The fantastic exploits of He-Man and his arch-rival, the evil Skeletor, are brought to the big screen for the first time in this live-action adventure.

programme.title: Solarbabies
programme.desc: This futuristic tale features the top talents of Hollywood's new generation including Jami Gertz, Lukas Haas and Jason Patric as prisoners in a fortress who plan their dazzling escape on wheels.

programme.title: You Gotta Eat Here
programme.desc: It's happy days for host John Catucci at a 1950's inspired diner.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares
programme.desc: Located in Bellmore, New York, The Mixing Bowl faces an influx of competition and barely has customers. Chef Ramsay strives to correct problems with the restaurant's appearance and menu.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares: Seascape
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay must work with a hard-headed chef and inexperienced owners to make some changes and bring customers back to Seascape.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay heads to Fair Lawn, New Jersey to find a lackadaisical wait staff hurting the Italian restaurant Campania's.

programme.title: The F Word (UK)
programme.desc: The first programme sees two Italian restaurants go head to head as they prepare a three course meal under Gordon’s watchful eye. Who will be good enough to wow the F Word diners and go on to fight for the title of The F Word’s Best Local Restaurant?

programme.title: The F Word (UK)
programme.desc: Two Indian restaurants go head to head. Curry is one of Britain’s favourite dishes so the pressure really is on. Gordon continues his search for the world's best ingredients, travelling to Scotland to hunt deer to create a new recipe - Venison Masala.

programme.title: The F Word (UK)
programme.desc: In tonight’s programme, two French restaurants go head to head - Bouchon Bistrot, Hexham; and The French Table, Surbiton. They prepare a three course meal under Gordon’s watchful eye - including foie gras, rack of lamb, grey mullet and crepes suzette.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths: The Iliad
programme.desc: The River Scamander and its banks are set alight by fireballs sent by the god Hephaestus. The river god spares Achilles, who immediately goes back on the rampage. The gods are shocked by his rage.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths: The Iliad
programme.desc: The Trojans are surprised to discover that the Greeks have suddenly left the shores of Troy, leaving only a wooden horse. Inside the horse, Greek warriors remain silent and still.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths: The Odyssey
programme.desc: Ten years after the sack of Troy by the Greek army, Zeus is alone on Olympus, left alone in his palace by the other gods. His daughter Athena is the only one remaining at his side.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths: The Odyssey
programme.desc: 10 years earlier, as the Greek warriors had just razed Troy.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths: The Odyssey
programme.desc: Odysseus and his companions are trapped in the Cyclops’ cave. But he is a man with a plan. He carves out a stake and, after having drunk Polyphemus under the table, drives it into his one eye.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths: The Odyssey
programme.desc: In Ithaca, Queen Penelope endures the presence of Suitors who covet her hand, and the throne of her husband Odysseus – who disappeared more than 10 years ago.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths: The Odyssey
programme.desc: A year has passed. It is time for Odysseus and his men to leave the witch Circe’s island and return to Ithaca. To do so, they must first go to meet the prophet Tiresias in the Underworld.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths: The Odyssey
programme.desc: Curiosity getting the best of him, Odysseus delves into the depths of the Underworld. He meets the souls of the Greek heroes who fought with him in the city of Troy.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths: The Odyssey
programme.desc: Odysseus' fleet tries to avoid Charybdis, the first sea monster ready to swallow them, but Scylla, a horrible multi-headed creature, destroys three of his ships.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths: The Odyssey
programme.desc: Odysseus has been living out peaceful days with Calypso for 7 years. But waves of nostalgia wash over him, and the memories of his wife, his son and his island never cease to torment him.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths: The Odyssey
programme.desc: The Suitors, informed by Melantho – one of Penelope's servants – learned that the queen had fooled them. They locked her up in the gynaeceum.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths: The Odyssey
programme.desc: Penelope is now forced to choose a husband among the Suitors.

programme.title: Oppenheimer: The Real Story

programme.title: The Viking Myths
programme.desc: Asgard, the kingdom of the Aesir, is under threat from monstrous creatures. To save Asgard, Odin embarks on an initiatory journey, during which he faces terrible trials to acquire knowledge.

programme.title: The Viking Myths
programme.desc: To appease Thor's fury, Loki, who has gone to the kingdom of the Dwarves, orders three wondrous objects - among which Thor's hammer, Mjölnir.

programme.title: The Viking Myths

programme.title: The Viking Myths
programme.desc: Odin, up on his observation throne, discovers the monstrous children Loki has fathered with the giantess: the wolf, the snake and the monstrous child.

programme.title: Mysterious Places with Stacy Keach
programme.desc: Who were the Etruscans? Where did they come from, and why were they different from other ancient societies? Most mysteriously, what caused their rapid fall from power and virtual disappearance?

programme.title: Mysterious Places with Stacy Keach
programme.desc: In the outback of Australia, one of the world's most bizarre rock formations is huge, imposing, and orange. To the aborigines, it is the part of the Earth from where all life sprung.

programme.title: Mysterious Places with Stacy Keach
programme.desc: From Stone Age ruins to wedge graves from the Neolithic Age, South West Ireland's so-called Dingle Peninsula is a land of mysterious ancient monuments.

programme.title: Mysterious Places with Stacy Keach

programme.desc: Grace is a naive college freshman trying to deal with campus culture and her outgoing new roommate. But when a demon takes over her body and unleashes chaos, Grace returns to the cold clutches of her grandmother and the strict rules of the church.

programme.title: I Shouldn't Be Alive
programme.desc: A Father and Son initially enjoy their experiences, but a sudden snowstorm wreaks havoc and they are forced to spend a night in a cave without any supplies or food.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: I Hate Doctors
programme.desc: A hospital worker feels like she's dying, but doctors can find nothing wrong; a physician's young son is a patient in her own ER, demanding her attention while she's trying to treat others; a woman's hobby of wild mushroom picking sends her to the ER.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Shredded!
programme.desc: A man is rushed to the ER, apparently clawed by a tiger, but he won't reveal the real source of his injuries; a patient says he's been shot in the head, but the bullet is nowhere to be found; a woman is brain dead, but one doctor thinks she can be saved.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Why Am I Blue?
programme.desc: A man arrives in the ER with blue skin and the doctor has no idea what's causing it; a teenage girl has abdominal pains that doctors have been unable to diagnose for years; a doctor struggles to save the life of the only survivor of a plane crash.

programme.desc: A con artist has adopted identities from navy pilot to Catholic priest.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It

programme.desc: A runaway train loaded with dangerous cargo rolls toward an unsuspecting town.

programme.title: Intervention
programme.desc: Ashley was raised by a mother who was addicted to methamphetamines and gambling.

programme.title: Intervention
programme.desc: Amy and her family escaped the violence of apartheid-era South Africa and immigrated to Canada 22 years ago.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: While seeking the advice of a fortune teller regarding her missing powers, Phoebe discovers in a premonition that a demon is going to kill them all after murdering the last one of the coven they were supposed to protect.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: Barbas, the Demon of Fear, returns and tricks Paige into giving him Cole's powers, and plots revenge on the Halliwell sisters by playing them against their darkest fears.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: When Phoebe must constantly save the life of her new boyfriend, a warlock shows up from the future, claiming that future Cole sent him in order to kill the boyfriend before Phoebe dies instead.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: Paige gets to know the whitelighter in her, when she meets her first charge, a man named Sam. Unbeknownst to her, Sam is actually her real father. Meanwhile, Cole rashly tries to get himself vanquished by the Charmed Ones.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: Phoebe falls prey to Jeric, a demon in search of the perfect body to hold the spirit of Isis, his dead lover. To trap the spirit, Jeric mummifies Phoebe's body. Meanwhile, Cole tries to save Phoebe by making a deal with the demon.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: After kidnapping Phoebe, Cole sends a shapeshifter to assume Phoebe's identity to help him manipulate Piper and Paige into giving him ownership of the manor, allowing him access to the powerful Nexus located beneath the house.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: In his twisted attempt to win Phoebe's heart back, Cole casts a spell that alters reality, which eliminates Paige as a Halliwell and destroys the Power of Three.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: Glen returns to Paige's life with a big surprise - he is about to get married to a girl called Jessica. Meanwhile, the sisters summon a Witch Doctor whom they want to dispatch all the evil remnants that surround the Manor.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: A demon attacks The Charmed Ones with dream dust, causing their nightmares to come to life. Paige is harassed by an evil clown at a baby shower, Piper has an affair and Phoebe is chased by a maniac with a chainsaw.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: After Piper is put on bed rest for high blood pressure, Phoebe and Paige discover that all magic has disappeared from the world.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: The Charmed Ones must protect Piper's son from two demons, but the baby has a few surprises of his own. Meanwhile, Paige goes undercover as a bounty hunter and Phoebe's future with the newspaper is threatened by the new owner.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: The Charmed Ones face a demon who has been killing leprechauns and stealing their magic. The leprechauns endow the sisters with good luck, which enables Paige to gain material wealth, Phoebe to meet a man, and Piper to book a major star to play P3.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: When Piper and Leo begin to have marital problems, Piper casts a spell to allow them to literally see their past together. However, the spell goes awry when Phoebe and Paige are sent back in time to relive Piper's memories.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: When a demon attacks and kills one of the three nympths that protect a lake, the Charmed ones try to help. However, once the demon is destroyed, the nypmphs decide Paige should replace the fallen nymph, and they won't take no for an answer.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Don Martín y Hortencia logran escapar del sanatorio, Bustillo ordena a los guardias que los busquen, pero no los hallan. Gabriela está arrepentida por no escuchar las advertencias de sus hijas.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Fernando enfurece al no encontrar las joyas que Gabriela tiene guardadas, se pone a la defensiva cuando Norma llega con Eva a revisar la casa. Dínora amenaza a Gabriela para que no grite.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Don Martín está feliz, luego de tanto sufrimiento, se reencuentra con sus nietas. Gabriela se enfrenta a Fernando y a Dínora, no aguanta más el encierro, quiere saber de su padre y sus hijas.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Juan y Paula se dejan llevar por sus pasiones y terminan en la cama, pero él mantiene su intención de firmar el contrato del acuerdo por un año. Sofía es víctima del chantaje de José, que quiere alejar a su hermano de la mujer que desea.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Gaspar no esconde más su odio hacia Emilio del Monte, lo desprecia por el daño que hizo y le confiesa a Juan que, por rencor, lo dejó morir en el accidente. Él reacciona con violencia, en medio de la celebración en honor a la memoria de su padre.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Gaspar revela el dolor que siente por el pasado y por el delito que cometió contra Emilio del Monte. José está dispuesto a unirse a él a pesar de las sospechas que han sido levantadas por Sofía en torno al accidente que provocó la muerte de Gustavo.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Sofía acusa a Gaspar de la muerte de Gustavo. José la amenaza con contarle todo a Paula si ella no retira la denuncia. Juan ve a Pedro y a Julieta besándose y los echa de la cabaña. Modesto atiende una llamada y pregunta si es Don Emilio.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: El beso de Alejandro despierta los traumas de Gabriela. Antonia se da cuenta de que David podría ser su nieto. Alejandro sorprende a Gabriela pidiéndole matrimonio. El Tigre rechaza el soborno de Antonia. Confirman que hay oro en el Chamuco.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Alejandro y Gabriela hacen el amor y ella le confiesa que fue violada. Él promete ayudarla a superar su trauma. Alejandro defiende a su futura esposa ante los mineros y de la maldad de Antonia. El parecido de David con Fernando impresiona a todos.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: El senador Villegas aconseja sin éxito a su ahijado que no siga con la minera. Alejandro y Gabriela planean irse de San Pedro, y el Tigre los apoya. Mientras, Antonia quiere hacer una prueba de ADN para saber quién es el padre del pequeño David.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Alejandro empieza a ganar terreno con David. Antonia convence a su hijo mayor de quedarse en San Pedro, se muestra arrepentida y anuncia en las fiestas patronales la futura boda, dejando boquiabiertos a todos. Fernando es internado por su adicción.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Don Martín está feliz, luego de tanto sufrimiento, se reencuentra con sus nietas. Gabriela se enfrenta a Fernando y a Dínora, no aguanta más el encierro, quiere saber de su padre y sus hijas.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Juan decide rescatar a Gabriela y va solo a la hacienda Elizondo a buscarla. Martín cuenta los tormentos por los que pasó, le asegura a todos que Dínora y Fernando son amantes y cómplices.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Gabriela se sorprende al ver a Juan, no esperaba que él arriesgara su vida por ella. Fernando y Dínora se desesperan al ser descubiertos, le disparan a Franco, la policía está en alerta.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama's paintings leave an art critic speechless, so Gomez sends for his friend, Sam Picasso, to teach Grandmama to paint in the abstract. The starving artist ignores Grandmama's and Morticia's work as he eats and paints.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Rockland Cartright III is a beatnik who crashes his motorbike into a tree and recuperates at the Addams house. Each regards the other as an oddity, although the family learns to appreciate certain aspects of Rockland's life.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Mr. Briggs, the postman, is hired by the government to do undercover work in the Addams house. While pretending to be a stamp collector, he investigates rumors that coded radio messages are being sent from the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch's tiny fire-eating mother visits and demands that Lurch's employers wait on her boy hand-and-foot after Lurch leads her to believe that it's his house. Lurch revels in the unexpected attention he gets from Morticia and Gomez.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's electrical output fails abruptly. Should they call a doctor or an electrician to bring Fester back? Morticia prescribes a bowl of porcupine mold, and both she and Gomez agree that long exposure to moon rays would be beneficial.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family would like to vacation on the moon, but the billion-dollar travel cost is slightly prohibitive. Uncle Fester volunteers $21.13 and Morticia, using Gomez's new supercomputer, suggests placing a $2,000 bet on the daily double horse race.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Cousin Itt is advocated as curator of the local zoo. Gomez uses his influence with Park Commissioner Fisk (guest star Alan Reed) to promote Itt for the job, but the zookeepers are convinced the Addamses' cousin should be confined to a cage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama (Blossom Rock) is hauled off to jail for setting up a fortune-telling booth in the Addamses' living room. Gomez (John Astin) volunteers to act as attorney, and the court session becomes a shambles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez (John Astin) loses his memory after hitting his head; he fails to recognize Morticia (Carolyn Jones) and says the house looks like a condemned museum. The Addamses take turns hitting Gomez on the head trying to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up). Fester convinces the company interviewer that he is qualified for the job.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums. When this proves unsatisfactory, Gomez and Fester decide to build a new harpsichord.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Morticia hears the stock market has crashed, she assumes that Gomez has been financially wiped out and rallies the family to help make money. Morticia gives lessons, Lurch and Fester run an escort service, and the kids run a poison drink stand.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While enjoying a moonlight picnic and snail hunt, the Addams Family is mistaken for Martians by uniformed investigators from Mysterious Space Objects Headquarters. In turn, Gomez (John Astin) and the clan regard their inquisitors with suspicion.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: An organ grinder's fugitive monkey leads Fester to believe that he has turned Pugsley into a monkey. Morticia and Gomez treat the monkey as though he were their son, welcoming him to the dinner table and giving him Pugsley's chores.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's favorite charity is having an auction--so Morticia persuades her family to part with things to sell. Donations include Wednesday's headless doll, the old flogging table, a stuffed vulture and Uncle Fester's dynamite.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The Addams Family ignores notices that their house is to be condemned to make way for a freeway. When sudden explosions cannot be traced to any member of the family but, instead, to city workmen, Gomez is forced to consider moving the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's pen pal, Madelyn, is coming to visit. Fester panics, as he has described himself as handsome, heroic and romantic. Gomez and Morticia agree that all Fester needs is a toupee and they help him make several styles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez are worried about Cousin Itt because he spends his days sleeping and dreaming in his tiny room. They decide that Itt would make an excellent marriage counselor, and pretend to be a couple with a failing marriage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A recording company's platter of Lurch's gravelly voice brings a screaming mob of teenage fans to the Addams house. To calm the crowd, Lurch seats himself at the harpsichord and rewards his fans with a song to end all songs.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Taken in by a psychologist's pronouncement that the only happily married couples are those who fight members of the Addams household devise schemes to start a battle between Gomez (John Astin) and Morticia (Carolyn Jones).

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez decides to bolster Cousin Itt's failing ego by making him the star of a production aimed as a birthday surprise for Wednesday. He hires the great director, Eric von Bissell, who gives Itt elocution lessons, causing a Hollywood star complex.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While Morticia and Gomez are celebrating their 13th wedding anniversary, she tells Wednesday and Pugsley a bedtime story of how she and Gomez first met. In this episode, Carolyn Jones plays Morticia, Morticia as a 22-year-old, and sister Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley refuse to go to bed until they hear the rest of the courtship story. Morticia resumes the tale via flashback, including the ceremony beginning with Ophelia Frump, Morticia's balmy sister, as the bride.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Romance seems close for Thing, the Addams right-hand-in-a-box, when Gomez's aunt arrives for a visit accompanied by Lady Fingers, her handmaiden. Thing enjoys the visit most because it gives him a chance to hold hands with one of his own kind.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez visit Mayor Henson to complain that their property tax is ridiculously low. After the Mayor proves his incompetence by offering a refund, Gomez is persuaded to become a candidate for the office.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: During a welcome home party for Cousin Itt, Morticia notices that the diminutive guest of honor seems to be losing his hair. Uncle Fester experiments with his chemistry set to produce a concoction that grows hair and tries the remedy on Itt.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams race through Bogotá, Colombia, where they encounter the "Yield," which gives them the power to stop another team's race for a designated amount of time.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams are in Manaus, Brazil, where they have big decisions to make when they encounter the first U-turn of the race.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams race through Asunción, Paraguay, where they must either stack a pyramid of watermelons or perform a traditional Paraguayan bottle dance.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams in Paris, France, must whip up some tasty treats and make enough Chantilly cream for four pies, as well as compete in a series of carnival games.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams reach new heights in Berlin, as they walk face-first down the exterior of a building for nearly 200 feet.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams travel to Almaty, Kazakhstan, where they brave the cold weather while perfecting a choreographed fight scene and decorate a yurt.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams race through Hyderabad, India, where they must complete double the detours, double the road blocks and travel double the distance.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The first ever mega leg in race history continues through Hyderabad, India, where teams compete in double the detours and double the road blocks, and travel double the distance.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The final five teams race through Siem Reap, Cambodia, where they face the second and final double U-turn of the season.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: In the first city sprint, the final four teams race through Manila, the capital of the Philippines, where they have no road blocks and no detours.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: With the $1 million prize on the line, the final three teams travel to New Orleans, where one team is crowned the winner.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The Amazing Race begins its historic 33rd trip around the world when 11 new teams take off from their homes and travel to their first destination, London, England.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The Amazing Race begins its historic 33rd trip around the world when 11 new teams take off from their homes and travel to their first destination, London, England.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: While racing through Scotland in February 2020, teams receive shocking and unprecedented news - for the first time in the show's history, THE AMAZING RACE suspends production due to the COVID-19 pandemic.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A hometown guitar player auditions with a dance band in the Mayberry jail.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Ellie Walker, a pretty young graduate pharmacist, moves to Mayberry to help her uncle out in the local drugstore.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy thinks Ellie is out to marry him. After a series of misunderstandings, Andy finally takes Ellie to the church picnic.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy gives his son, Opie, a lecture on keeping promises, but must break one of his own in order to persuade a runaway kid to come home.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy and Ellie stage a hold-up at the drugstore so that Barney can impress Miss Rosemary with his heroics.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy makes a judgment concerning his son, Opie, before hearing the boy's side of the story.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy tries to stop a long-time feud between 2 mountain families so their children can get married.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Ellie Walker sets the men and women of Mayberry against each other when she runs for a seat on the town council.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy and Barney give a Christmas party in the jail for a prisoner and his family, and thereby convert the town scrooge.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A stranger comes to Mayberry and disrupts the life of the townspeople because he knows everyone's name and business.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A Hollywood producer descends on Mayberry and the town proceeds to make itself over in Hollywood's image.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy does some slick dealing to get rid of the town's worthless cannon, but when Opie mimics his father's shady deed, Andy has second thoughts.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Aunt Bee, accused by Andy of being a gossip, sets out to prove that men are bigger gossips than women.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy, appointed judge of a beauty contest, shows the wisdom of Solomon by picking a popular winner.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy and Barney finally solve the problem of moonshining in Mayberry.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy tries to counsel the constantly bickering couple, Fred and Jennie Boone, with mixed results.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy suspects that a traveling record promoter is a con artist and he fears for the townsfolk who invested in his record.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: When Barney's over-zealousness causes him to become a laughing stock, Andy tactfully arranges for Barney to regain his status.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A nationally known con man becomes a hero to Aunt Bee, Opie and Barney when he is held for two days in the Mayberry jail.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy plays matchmaker for Barney but finds himself in difficulty when Barney misinterprets his efforts.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy and Opie struggle to keep house when Aunt Bee leaves for a few days.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy finally proposes to Ellie when he becomes convinced that the new young doctor in town is trying to steal his girl.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Town drunk, Otis Campbell, turns out to be the only living descendant of a Revolutionary War hero, much to the dismay of the mayor.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A state inspector learns some unique but effective police methods employed by the Mayberry sheriff.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy and Ellie give the Cinderella treatment to a farmer's daughter.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy, faced with the unpleasant duty of serving an eviction notice, discovers a way to save the mortgagee's home.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy has to deliver a baby for a farmer's wife when the local doctor is unavailable.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: The trees have shed their snow and ice has begun to thaw, Spring will arrive soon in the incredibly beautiful Bob Ross landscape.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Catch a glimpse of the sun trying to break through shades of soft crimson, shining its golden touch upon the land. Bob Ross creates another black canvas beauty today.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A snow-covered winter fantasy land seems so real, and Bob Ross shows you how easy his special painting technique can be.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Nicholas Hankins: Bob Ross' Unfinished Season
programme.desc: Paint along with Nicholas Hankins as we explore an expansive view of a Bob Ross snow capped mountain.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross uses a little imagination and lots of colors to create this soft, luxurious early autumn lake scene.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Faraway peaks appear to almost float amongst the clouds as Bob Ross creates a gently flowing river splashing into the foreground.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross' dramatic use of blue tones results in an emotional depiction of stark waves at night - all tucked inside an oval shape.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Beneath a soft purple mountain range, lots of trees and bushes surround a secret little lake, as only Bob Ross can create on canvas.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Hike into the midst of a snow-covered forest with Bob Ross and enjoy the beauty of leafless trees in slumber and texture you can almost feel.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Guest Artist Dan Jester shares with us the beauty of sweet lavender clusters nestled in the heart of a snowy winter forest.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Experience the serenity and silence of a fresh undisturbed snowfall with Bob Ross when he takes you to a lovely cabin deep in northern country.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Take a relaxing walk with Bob Ross through a bright green grassy forest, where a smooth crystal waterway flows so, so quietly.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A real Bob Ross classic - the majestic snow-covered mountain, rolling foothills, leafy trees and bushes, and serene lake.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Old-time memories are conjured up by the sight of this lonesome big barn that Bob Ross places on the edge of a forest.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Step into an oval classic with Bob Ross and get inspired by the gorgeous browns and oranges of undoubtedly the most beautiful season of all.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross presents a really unique idea using black gesso -- two lovely paintings in one -- summer and winter scenes overlapping on the same canvas!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: On a clear day, Bob Ross creates an almighty mountain captured by a clear blue sky - another spectacular masterpiece on canvas.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A partially blackened canvas is all you need to start creating this dark, mood-filled misty waterfall scene with artist Bob Ross.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Take a nice walk with Bob Ross along a peacefully flowing river and enjoy a view of gorgeous amethyst mountains and stately trees in the distance.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A real viewer favorite, Bob Ross teaches us how to capture the exciting colors of autumn with trees, trees, and trees galore!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Breaking the silence of a misty morning is a rippling brook through the forest. Join Bob Ross as he takes you to this favorite escape.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Travel into the unknown with Bob Ross and discover the beauty of a lovely cabin, freshly fallen snow, and warm, colorful skies in an oval.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bundle up with Bob Ross and visit the north in the middle of winter! Snow and ice abound in a profusion of beauty.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Paint along with Bob Ross and discover the beauty of a secluded log home with only quiet pond and rustic trees for companionship.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross takes us to an isolated cabin deep in the woods on a cold, snowy winter day.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A wilderness path leads you to the side of a still lake in a setting that Bob Ross accents with an abundance of trees.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Imagine yourself nestled in a Bob Ross cabin, hidden in the midst of the lush green forest surrounded by the sounds of nature.

programme.title: The Challenge
programme.desc: Wes gives Eric and Katie pointers on how to tackle competing in Exile, injuries threaten to take one team out of the game, and two more contestants are sent home.

programme.title: The Challenge
programme.desc: One team receives devastating news, the game is proving to be too much for Diem, and friendships are on the line at deliberation.

programme.title: The Challenge
programme.desc: Linette confronts Diem about her decision to send her to Exile, one contestant's fear of heights threatens their team's standing in the Jump Down Under challenge, and one team is sent home.

programme.title: The Challenge
programme.desc: The teams dive out of their comfort zones in Deep Blue, and alliances are tested when the weaker teams attempt to take out a top team in deliberation.

programme.title: The Challenge
programme.desc: The battle for immunity is at an all-time high when the players navigate a tough obstacle course, and then shock and awe abound when the Exile ends in a surprise.

programme.title: The Challenge
programme.desc: A twist in the Death Roll challenge gives the winning team an advantage, Diem and Tina come to blows over deliberation, and two teams in Exile are neck and neck for a spot in the finals.

programme.title: The Challenge
programme.desc: The remaining three teams compete in an intense final challenge for a chance to take home $250,000.

programme.title: The Challenge
programme.desc: The contestants arrive in Brazil and learn the rules of the game, then TJ tests their strength and endurance in the Reachin' Out challenge, and two guys are selected for The Duel.

programme.title: The Challenge
programme.desc: The first guy heads home after losing the I Can duel, the players get down and dirty in the Ring Toss challenge, and one contender overcomes a fear before another jeopardizes her own future.

programme.title: The Challenge
programme.desc: A player's temper gets the best of her, the men and women partner up for the Pass with Care challenge, and two guys face off in the Ascender duel before one of them is sent packing.

programme.title: The Challenge
programme.desc: The competitors hold nothing back in the Roller Derby challenge, and two women must prove who wants it more as they hold on for dear life in the Pole Wrestle duel.

programme.title: The Challenge
programme.desc: The players go head-to-head during the Push Over challenge, two guys face off in the Ascender duel, and one person threatens an alliance while forming one of their own.

programme.title: The Challenge

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack and Sue head into the state-of-the-art Animal Care Center at Busch Gardens Tampa Bay to assist veterinarians performing an exam on a lion!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack as he explores Chile from top to bottom! From the unique animals of the Atacama Desert to picturesque Patagonia, come along for a journey filled with South American wildlife like flamingoes, penguins, guanacos, and much more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he meets creatures armed with superb scales, like Nile Crocodiles, Galapagos Tortoises, Thorny Devils, an African Rock Python, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack as he journeys to Lake Nakuru National Park where wildlife is prospering in Central Kenya. The thriving ecosystem is home to more than a million flamingos, endangered white and black rhinos, and the rare Rothschild giraffe.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Come along for an epic adventure to the tropical Caribbean Island of Curacao! Join Jungle Jack as he braves a deep diving Submarine, encounters Dolphins on the high seas, and rolls up his sleeves for Coral Reef Conservation.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Peru is brimming with unique wildlife, come along as Jungle Jack takes the adventure of a lifetime down the mighty Amazon! From Tapir and Sloth to Pink River Dolphins and Giant River Otters, this is a journey you won't want to miss!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: From the far reaches of the beautiful Samburu lands in Northern Kenya, come along with Jack for an unforgettable elephant adventure, with legendary Save the Elephants founder Iain Douglas Hamilton.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Top Dogs
programme.desc: This countdown is going to the dogs! Come along for seven of Jack’s favorite dog days from a lifetime of walking, chasing, and playing with human’s best friend.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Jack's Big Six
programme.desc: In this episode Jack counts down his experiences with some amazing animals, the leopard, cape buffalo, elephant, rhino and lion, plus one more animal Jungle Jack just couldn't leave off the list!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack as he meets the lucky creatures that are cared for by some of the most interesting veterinarians from across the world. Koalas, Cheetahs, Gorillas, Dogs, Eland, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Snakes Alive
programme.desc: Jack is counting down his scaliest, slitheriest, snakiest safaris ever. From green anacondas and cobras to eastern diamondbacks, puff adders, taipans and more… this Wild Countdown has teeth!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Going the Distance
programme.desc: Jungle Jack counts down nature’s long-distance animal athletes!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Living Fossils
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he meets some of the most ancient species living on Earth. Red pandas, hoatzins, koalas, crocodiles and pelicans!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: Jack travels to the Katmai region of Alaska to experience the annual arrival of throngs of brown bears feeding on Sockeye salmon in the Kulik River. Jack encounters bears everywhere, even on a makeshift tundra golf course.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Wild Countdown is turning 100! Join Jungle Jack as he celebrates by counting down his favorite adventures.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jungle Jack travels to the Florida Keys to return twin orphaned Manatees back to the wild, before visiting the Dolphin Research Center.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack for an epic adventure to the lush African country of Gabon where he encounters Mandrills, Gorillas, Sea Turtles, Elephants, and some of the most pristine landscapes on the planet!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack and his daughter Suzanne as they put their skills to the test at Shamwari's Ranger School where they must experience everything from driving a 4x4, to tracking animals on foot, including a very up-close look at a pride of hungry Lions.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Rescued
programme.desc: Come along on an amazing adventure with some remarkable animals, like endangered cheetahs, an orphaned wombat, and even a grey whale, that are getting a second chance.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Stinkiest Stinkers
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he sniffs out the smelliest animals on the planet! Sloths, Tasmanian devils, sperm whales, binturongs, hyenas, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Get ready for the trek of a lifetime, deep into the forests of Gabon, as Jack searches for elusive lowland Gorillas!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack and Sue are headed to Paso Robles, California to go behind the scenes at the "Zoo to You" ranch, where rescued wildlife become animal ambassadors. They get up close and personal with a Bear, Bengal Tiger, Camel, Peregrine Falcon, and much more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he meets the remarkable rescued residents of The Farm Sanctuary in California. Loveable cows, goats, pigs and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Getting Around
programme.desc: Traveling the world in search of exotic animals, like migrating wildebeest, rare mountain gorillas, and amazing underwater sea life, Jungle Jack has hitched rides on hot-air balloons, camels, and even submarines!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Wild Hair
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack for six warm and fuzzy tales about animals sporting funky fur! Musk ox, giraffe, tapir, bison, cheetah and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Feeding Frenzy
programme.desc: Today’s countdown is filled with delicious and nutritious adventures. From carnivores like jackals, lions, and sharks to our vegetarian friends, the elephants, Jungle Jack is gearing up for a Feeding Frenzy!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack and Joel give a very lucky animal at a local shelter a new lease on life and a starring role in Joel's new show. And, if you thought training dogs and cats was challenging, check out Jack trying to train lemurs, kangaroos and whole lot more!

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: At the scene of a murder, sometimes the victim provides the only clues to their killer. Forensic anthropologists use skeletal remains to decipher the clues written in the bones.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When killers hide or destroy the remains of their victims, it becomes the mission of forensic scientists to reconstruct the scenes and prove murder for an absent witness.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Toxicology: While drugs can cure disease and ease pain, they can also be agents of murder. Toxicologists can examine blood and tissue to uncover cases where death is not as natural as it may seem–from slow arsenic poisoning to quick cocaine overdoses.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Sometimes, the cause of death does not match the scene of the crime. When an untraceable poison is used to commit murder, homicide detectives turn to forensic toxicologists to follow a killer's tracks and expose a toxic death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Lies and deceit can often throw investigators off the trail of justice. But when hard evidence contradicts a killer's story, police must use the clues to piece together the truth.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some people will let nothing stand between them and their goals. In their tortured minds, raw desire replaces all reason, and homicide becomes a convenient means to an end.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A millionaire is found dead, murdered for a stash of buried silver. A young woman dates violent men, only to be killed by her best friend.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A southeastern Virginia community is stunned by a crime no one can believe. A pregnant woman murdered, her baby lost. Across the state, another town feels a similar shock, a brutal, random slaying in a most unexpected setting.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The solution to the most heinous crimes often hinge on the smallest of clues. Investigators must have their eyes trained to find the full story of a murder written in a single scrap of evidence.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Poisoners are the most devious of killers, relying on stealth or their victim's trust in order to steal their lives. They're the most dangerous creatures in the world: smart assassins. And they usually don't stop at one kill.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Accidental deaths, suicides, disappearances, and fires; they're an everyday part of an insurance investigator's life. But cases shouldn't be taken at face value. Forensics has become a tool for exposing insurance fraud.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some killers choose to hide their victims – And investigators must then rely on forensic examiners to uncover proof of murder – These are just two extraordinary crimes that have made their way into the medical examiner's casebook.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A killer may strike in the middle of the night, and hide clues well. But the police are always there, ready and working, and they will never give up when they're on the trail of criminals who decide it's Killing Time.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Forensics in the O.J. Simpson Murder Trial: Millions watched on television as the jury rendered their verdict. Orenthal James Simpson was found not guilty of murder.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A handsome Italian count arrives in North Fork. The town bully ridicules his manner of speech and dress and provokes the Count to challenge him to a duel.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A new bank opens and Banker Hamilton hires a slow-witted gunman to guard the safe. When some of the gunman's old outlaw friends arrive in town they propose he join them in robbing the bank.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark tries to play Cupid between Lucas and a stranger who arrives in North Fork, the girl's older brothers accuse him of trifling with her affections and challenge him to fight.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An arch-criminal has been run out of New Orleans and is passing through North Fork. Spotting the McCain ranch, he tells McCain he wants to buy it.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Young Dan Willard takes on Marshal Micah Torrence's job. With no experience, he takes a tough stand with a bunch of Texas cowhands whose high spirits are evident at the saloon.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark are returning from a big cattle sale when the stage is robbed by three outlaws. Lucas, desperate to recover the money that was stolen, is determined to pursue the outlaws.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas gets in trouble when he accuses the foreman of a neighboring ranch of rustling some of his cattle.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An Argentine family moves to North Fork. The townspeople are unfriendly to them, making fun of their clothing and customs. The Argentinean adult immigrant is openly hostile in return.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark find themselves exposed to anthrax after they adopt a stray horse whose owner has been killed in a gunfight.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After the end of the Civil War, General Phil Sheridan, who has been appointed Governor of the New Mexico Territory, is on an inspection tour of the country.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A famous gunfighter marries and decides to retire. He and his wife settle down in North Fork and open a store, but three outlaws arrive in town looking to best him in a gunfight.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An old friend of Lucas McCain's, a traveling photographer, comes to North Fork plying his trade. When a murder is committed, the photographer is accused of the crime.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The townsfolk of North Fork decide to give a young couple a shivaree celebration. When the drunken crowd gets out of hand and roughs up the bride-to-be, the young groom challenges them.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a young boy from Brooklyn is accused of murder, Mark, believing the boy's claim of innocence, hides him until he can find the real killer.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: U.S. Marshal Sam Buckhart arrives in North Fork in search of renegade Indians suspected of the brutal killing of a Texas Ranger and his family.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Sid Fallon tries to blackmail former gambler Julia Andueza into allowing him to use her boarding house as a gambling hall and saloon.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas puts his life in jeopardy when he agrees to testify in a murder case where the first witness was killed before he could testify, and the killer is still at large.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Outlaw Sam Morley falls in love with a young woman who has a serious illness and asks Lucas to turn him in for the reward and use the money to pay for her medical care.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas welcomes his old friend Tom Birch, who once saved his life, unaware that the man is now a bank robber on the run with his gang.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Dan Maury, released from Yuma prison, arrives in North Fork intent on getting even with Marshal Torrance, who helped send him to jail.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Young Mark McCain is eager to help lawman Jay Jefferson, who has arrived in North Fork intent on killing an outlaw for the reward, whether he is the right man or not.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas takes in an orphaned teen being raised by his abusive uncle after there is trouble at the school.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The McCains try to be tolerant of their embittered neighbor Abel MacDonald, but they decide he's gone too far when he won't allow his injured boy to get medical treatment.

programme.desc: An unfounded rumor causes North Fork's outspoken feminist schoolteacher to be attacked by a mob of angry townspeople.

programme.desc: Rick ataca a Negan cuando este se dirigía a Hilltop y terminan enfrentándose en un edificio abandonado, pero Simon y Dwight siguen el rastro de Negan. Mientras tanto, Maggie, Enid, Michonne y Rosita discuten sobre la propuesta de una desconocida.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Los Saviors, ahora dirigidos por Simon, atacan Hilltop pese a que algunos de sus combatientes están dentro, presos. Maggie organiza la defensa del poblado pero, ¿podrán evitar una masacre como la que Simon perpetró contra el grupo de Jadis?

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Jadis planea una muerte horrenda para Negan. Mientras, Morgan va en busca de Henry y Rick sale de Hilltop para cazar a los que huyeron durante el asalto comandado por Simon. Finalmente, los dos se encuentran en territorio enemigo.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Mientras los hombres de Negan continúan con su ofensiva, Aaron sigue buscando aliados nuevos, pese a que pueda costarle la vida. Daryl y Rosita se enfrentan a un viejo amigo.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Las comunidades unen sus fuerzas en la última batalla contra los Salvadores. Negan ha conseguido entregar a Rick un mapa con instrucciones mapas, para así tenderle una emboscada.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick y su grupo hacen un viaje arriesgado a Washington, D. C. para buscar los artefactos que necesitarán para construir la civilización que él y Carl imaginaron.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Las comunidades se unen para restaurar un puente que facilite la comunicación y el comercio, pero alguien resulta gravemente herido. Además, varios Saviors han desaparecido.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Una desaparición misteriosa pone en peligro los planes para el futuro de Rick y divide al grupo mientras construyen un puente.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: La visión de Rick de un futuro civilizado se ve amenazada por un cúmulo de traiciones y agravios pasados que nunca fueron vengados ni perdonados.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick se ve obligado a enfrentar el pasado en su intento por proteger a las comunidades y el futuro que Carl y él concibieron.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Seis años después de la desaparición de Rick, un grupo recién llegado a Alexandria, liderados por la temperamental Magna, genera problemas a los habitantes de la comunidad.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Eugene está solo y en peligro, perseguido por una horda de zombis que, aparentemente, hablan. Mientras tanto, Michonne guía al grupo de Magna hasta Hilltop, donde esperan ser aceptados como nuevos miembros de la comunidad.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl, Jesus y Aaron encuentran a Eugene, pero la horda de zombis parlantes los persigue incansablemente. Entretanto, en Alexandria, Negan escapa de su confinamiento porque a Gabriel se le olvida cerrar la puerta de su celda.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Los grupos individuales están convencidos de que pueden construir un futuro mejor por separado, pero la pérdida de un miembro los lleva a unir fuerzas. Se revela una amenaza perturbadora y peligrosa.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl libera a Henry porque le estaba contando demasiadas cosas a Lydia y, después, interroga a la adolescente sobre su grupo. Entetanto, el grupo de Magna desobedece a Tara y se adentra por la noche en el bosque en busca de Luke.

programme.desc: An Army sergeant's letter to President Grant sends agents West and Gordon to a lonely outpost to fight a gang of terrorists.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agent West aids a Russian prince in recovering an all-important icon, sought also by a desperate, dangerous enemy.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Roger finishes the landscape. Tommy makes disguised PVC floor registers. Richard installs the storm windows. The house is revealed, and everyone celebrates the renovated home.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: A new project begins a traditional farmhouse in Massachusetts, built in a factory 200 miles away.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tommy and Kevin visit the Vermont factory where the house is built. Richard meets Ed Akerley, who blasts rock to make room for the foundation. Norm and Erik watch Scott McKenzy lay the foundation.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: An inspector checks the foundation as a perimeter drain is installed. The framing process begins. An architect explains her landscape plan to make the property look antique.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin sees the plan for the living/dining room and the roof. After framing the house, the crew moves to the garage. Exterior trim arrives. Kevin learns how to attach the fascia board to the rafters.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Erik lays shingles on the roof. Kevin learns colonial roof making. In Vermont, Kevin sees handcrafted light fixtures. Window installation begins. Norm heads to Maine to search for salvaged doors.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Drilling begins on a geothermal system. Norm visits first-period homes. Kevin tours a factory where the stairs and panels are built. On the North Shore, he learns of a new technology to seal ductwork.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin helps install clapboard siding. Roger selects salvaged granite. Richard discusses the insulation plan and sees how the geothermal pipes are connected. Kevin watches the cabinets come together.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin helps fit the cabinets. Work starts on the driveway. Granite is used for a patio. The den gets wainscoting. The homeowners select interior paint colors. Erik installs the factory-made staircase.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The staircase is finished. Richard shows the system for getting well water. A backup generator is installed. Kevin learns to fit a reproduction lantern. Kim turns a mud pit into a beautiful front yard.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin builds a custom closet. Norm and Tommy see Kristina's designs. Richard shows Kevin the geothermal system. Kevin gets a tour of the second floor. The team celebrates another job well done.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin, Norm, Roger, Richard, and Tommy are back in Arlington—this time at an early English-style Arts and Crafts house built in 1909.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The design process kicks off. Old plaster walls are carefully demolished. Landscape plans and Roger begins removing the old Silver Maple. Kevin and Tommy bring down the exterior back wall.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tommy and Kevin replace a 100-year-old wooden beam with a new steel one. The tank gets removed by a specialist. The old concrete from the foundation gets transported to a recycling center.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The new concrete foundation is poured. Finding mature specimen trees for the yard. A precast concrete bulkhead is installed. The old rubble foundation gets waterproofed with synthetic rubber spray.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Steel beam fabrication and erection on the house. HVAC plans for the second floor. Front porch demoed with heavy machinery and new footings for a new porch. Working on the firebox and chimney.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Starting a new chimney. A 100-year-old brick factory. Designing the kitchen of the homeowner’s dreams. Tommy changes the pitch of the two back dormers to match the pitch of the new gable.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: A custom range hood. The original chimney is demoed and Mark McCullough builds a new one. Family room, tile, and wood paneling design choices. A new slab floor is coated with a speckled epoxy.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: A hidden doorway is revealed. The new master bath presents a classic plumbing problem. Creating elaborate cuts with computerized machines. Scott Caron installs a ceiling fan. Arts and Crafts windows.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tommy builds the new Arts and Crafts front porch. Richard travels to the world’s largest underground quarry. Design and color selection. Mark McCullough shows Kevin the lost art of stucco.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: An outdoor yoga shed. Installing a standing-seam copper roof. Trim a window using a PVC product. Richard installs a state-of-the-art boiler. Richard shows advanced, eco-friendly building techniques.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Removing a service pole at the front of the property. Building flared porch columns. A new brick patio. Kitchen cabinets are delivered and installed. Flashing decorative pieces on front gables.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Shingling the house. Figuring out window treatments. Radiant floor tubing is installed. Mark repairs the grand living-room fireplace. Tommy and Norm frame up the back deck coming out the side door.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tommy assembles the roof. Kevin tries Lazure painting technique. Installing wood paneling in a corner of the living room and refinishing oak veneer. Roger plants screening trees that Emily selected.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Installing Shiplap. Laying the second set of steps for a walkway. Mauro Henrique reviews paneling. Marble slab is cut for the kitchen island. A cast stone mantel surrounds the new fireplace.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Final marble kitchen island installation. Laying giant stones for a fieldstone wall. How radiant floor heating and state of the art air conditioning works. Tommy and Kevin install a dog door.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The Arts and Crafts house in Arlington is near completion and the guys come to take a last look and celebrate with the homeowners. Roger Cook presents the homeowners with a special gift.

programme.desc: Terri falls for Jack when he buys a mustache which makes him look like her old boyfriend.

programme.desc: Larry discovers an answered magazine quiz and he and Jack think one of the girls wants to have an affair with Jack. They take the girls on a weekend trip to find out who answered the quiz so Jack can talk her out of it.

programme.title: Antonio Margarito vs Miguel Cotto 1

programme.title: Miguel Cotto vs Antonio Margarito 2

programme.title: Floyd Mayweather vs Jose Luis Castillo 1

programme.title: Janibek Alimkhanuly vs Hassan N'Dam N'Jikam

programme.title: Floyd Mayeather vs Jose Luis Castillo 2

programme.title: Transformers Beast Wars
programme.desc: Waspinator is taken over by the spark of Starscream. The Predacons use his new power and tactical knowledge to take over the Maximal base.

programme.title: Transformers Beast Wars

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Sideswipe blackmails Strongarm into doing all his work while the team tries to capture crab-like CLAMPDOWN, jailed for the very same crime back on Cybertron, before he can join Steeljaw’s Pack.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise

programme.desc: Mad-scientist VERTEBREAK captures Sideswipe, steals his body and stores the Autobot’s head in a jar, leaving Sideswipe to think he’s unable to contribute to the team.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Bee and the Team head to the ocean floor to capture Decepticon OCTOPUNCH, not knowing that Grimlock is covering up a serious injury.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: An attempt to fix the ailing Fixit goes horribly wrong, turning the Mini-Con into a fully weaponized and lethal prison guard who mistakes the Bee Team for Decepticon fugitives.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: As Optimus Prime and Megatron prepare to face off in a duel, Megatron secretly plots to unleash the latest addition to his Decepticon army—the Constructicons – along with Devastator, a Decepticon unlike any the Autobots have ever seen before!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: When Spike is wounded and knocked unconscious in a Decepticon attack, Sparkplug and Wheeljack reluctantly transfer his consciousness into their experimental robot, Autobot X, to save him.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: With Wheeljacks' newest invention, The Immobilizer, any object in motion can be frozen. Although it may prove valuable in the fight against evil, it may also prove too dangerous to exist…especially once Megatron gets his hands on it.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Wheeljacks' newest invention, The Immobilizer, can freeze any object in motion. It could be a valuable tool in the Autobot's fight against evil, but it may also prove to be too dangerous to exist,especially after Megatron gets his hands on it.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Part 2 of 2. Time portals are opening up all over the world due to the Decepticons having tapped into the mysterious energy on the island. The Autobots have their hands full trying to keep the peace and return everyone and everything to the correct time.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Accused of treason, Mirage sets out on his own to stop the Decepticons and Insecticons, as well as prove himself innocent. But when his plan to play the two evil forces against each other fails, a chain of events is set off where no one can be trusted.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Tormenta & Wrecking Ball team up to take on Princess Aussie & Leia Makoa in can't miss tag team action! The Fabulous Lana Star accompanies Penelope Pink as she goes up against the formidable Jessie Jones!

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Last week we learned in an exclusive interview with David McLane that The Beast has thrown her crutches to the side – and that her ankle rehab is over! With the crutches pushed aside, The Beast will return to WOW in the coming weeks...

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation

programme.title: Maverick
programme.desc: Bart meets a gentleman who beats him at his own game: The man leaves town with Bart's stolen $1,000 while Bart must face both a murder charge and an amorous dance hall girl.

programme.title: Maverick
programme.desc: To pay off a gambling debt, Bret agrees to take three Englishmen on a bear hunt -- but the four find themselves the hunted when they are ambushed and left to die in the desert.

programme.title: Maverick
programme.desc: Bart is sentenced to be hanged for a crime he didn't commit. Martin Landau guest stars.

programme.title: Maverick
programme.desc: Bret is offered $6000 to track down a murderer in Mexico and bring him back to the U.S. He resorts to his wits to trick the fugitive into returning peacefully.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Gunman Nate Crandall murders a rancher to steal $20,000. Sheriff Hollister gets to the loot first and locks it in a safe. Determined to get the money, Crandall involves young Jim Edwards in a plot to rob the safe and take the fall for the killing.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Reverend Tuttle is aboard the stagecoach when it is robbed by three masked gunmen. Sheriff Hollister suspects Big Jim Sten, boss of a nearby town, is behind the robbery. But when the reverend and Hollister visit Sten's town, a secret is revealed.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Jett Sergeant, son of a notorious outlaw, sees Hollister kill his father in a shootout and vows he will kill the Sheriff. Clay tries to set him straight, but the youth teams up with two of his father's henchmen in a plot a murder the Sheriff.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Recently released from prison, Frank Leslie returns to Tombstone to marry the widow of the man he killed and pledges never to use guns again. But four brothers of Leslie's victim come to Tombstone intent on revenge, putting his oath to the test.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Hollister and Claibourne journey to a neighboring town and find it evacuated in anticipation of the arrival of an outlaw band. Clay and the editor are captured and the leader of the marauders is killed as a new outlaw takes command.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Sheriff Hollister has to fire a young deputy for being 'trigger-happy.' The youngster takes a job as a guard in the Saloon, where he unnecessarily guns down a popular rancher, and when Hollister orders him out of town, the young man defies him.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: A Mexican bandito, Augustine Ramirez, has been crossing the border into Tombstone Territory to prey on the ranchers and then retreating to Mexico, where international law protects him. Hollister goes undercover to infiltrate the bandit's lair.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Hollister learns that the hatchet men of a powerful Chinese society are on a mission to find a society member's girlfriend who has been hidden away by a Chinese Quarter resident. Hollister faces a type of danger unfamiliar to the West.
